targets.expr: 100 * sum by(storage) (proxmox_node_storage_used_bytes{cluster=~"$cluster", shared="true"}) / sum by(storage) (proxmox_node_storage_total_bytes{cluster=~"$cluster", shared="true"})
100 * sum by(storage, node) (proxmox_node_storage_used_bytes{cluster=~"$cluster", shared="false"}) / sum by(storage, node) (proxmox_node_storage_total_bytes{cluster=~"$cluster", shared="false"})

panels.title: Current Storage Utilization
